summary: Discount Approval Risk Overlay testing complete. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified. Risk classification (safe/warning/critical) is correctly implemented in the margin engine. Existing discount requests use legacy data (margin_safe) which frontend handles gracefully via fallback logic.
critical_code_review_comments: discount_request_service.py: _classify_discount_risk function correctly classifies risk as safe (<80% budget), warning (80-100% budget), or critical (>100% budget)
discount_request_service.py: _calculate_margin_impact returns risk_level and risk_message for new requests
AdminDiscountRequestsPage.jsx: Risk overlay panel (data-testid='risk-overlay-panel') shows in drawer footer for pending requests
AdminDiscountRequestsPage.jsx: Critical confirm checkbox (data-testid='critical-confirm-checkbox') appears only for critical risk
AdminDiscountRequestsPage.jsx: Approve button disabled for critical risk until checkbox is checked (line 311)
AdminDiscountRequestsPage.jsx: Fallback logic handles legacy data without risk_level (line 262)
DiscountAnalyticsPage.jsx: KPI cards (data-testid='kpi-cards') display real aggregated data
DiscountAnalyticsPage.jsx: High-risk table shows risk badges (safe/warning/critical)
discount_analytics_routes.py: All 6 endpoints properly protected with admin auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: Discount Approval Risk Overlay feature is fully implemented. Backend returns risk_level (safe/warning/critical) and risk_message in margin_impact for new discount requests. Existing requests have legacy data (margin_safe only) which frontend handles via fallback. Critical risk checkbox and approve button disable logic are implemented but could not be fully tested as no pending critical requests exist in the system. The only critical request (TEST_Customer_Fixed) was already rejected.

notes.legacy_data_handling: Existing discount requests don't have risk_level field. Frontend uses fallback: margin_safe ? 'safe' : 'critical'
notes.critical_checkbox_testing: Could not fully test critical checkbox behavior as no pending critical requests exist. The only critical request (TEST_Customer_Fixed with TZS 50,000 discount) was already rejected.
notes.risk_classification_thresholds: Safe: <80% of discount budget, Warning: 80-100%, Critical: >100%
